Body.Content:
Skills allow extensibility of the SharePoint AI Agent, enabling customizable solutions that adapt to unique business needs. They address gaps in out-of-the-box functionality for unique business processes and enable reusable multi-step workflows.

GA date: May CY2026

Preview date: April CY2026

message.Title: SharePoint: Extending AI in SharePoint using custom skills
